prompt: Determine whether the work meets the applicable code, spec, drawing, or manufacturer requirement.
scenario: You are on a residential job — a service call, remodel, or homeowner installation with prescriptive code and manufacturer instructions. The work under review is NM/MC cable routing & protection, part of the Electrical scope. The observed field condition is: NM within 1¼ in. of stud face without nail plate. The work is roughed in — installed or assembled, but not yet closed out. Reference material on hand: NEC 300.4, 334, 330.
title: Compliance check: NM/MC cable routing & protection (residential job)
